meta.source: Figma 'Living Room' page (Emerald Residence 107), frame 0:2, scale 1px = 1cm — G2 conversion session, 2026-07-20. Successor to spike/geometry.json; positions below reflect the current Figma layout, not the spike-era one.
meta.coords: position = [x, y, z] of each item's plan-view CENTER (not top-left, unlike geometry.json); x = Figma x, z = Figma y, y = up/floor-snap height. rotationDeg is yaw around the vertical axis.
meta.assumed: Ceiling 240 confirmed (spike 3, door-to-wall pixel ratio). Window sill 90 / height 120 assumed; balcony door full-height glass (opening to 210), carried from geometry.json — not re-derivable from the 2D Figma plan.
changedSinceSpike3: Kitchen enclosure removed from the Figma layout (grey block gone); floor segment renamed kitchen-and-passage -> entrance-hallway, geometry unchanged, main-door position unchanged.
Rug (SONDEROD) moved ~77cm north — now only partly under the sofa, more under the swivel-chair/coffee-table zone.

Bookshelf: laid on its side (new height 72cm = old width), legs removed, relocated from the south wall near the sofa to standing near Billy+Hogadal/dining table. Back particle-board panel removed — open both sides, books accessible from either face, spines facing outward.
Billy+Hogadal shelving shifted ~53cm east, now close against the water cooler.
Dining table rotated 90deg in place (intrinsic dims unchanged, 153x92) and shifted slightly east/north.
Sofa and coffee table shifted a small amount (~7-16cm) — treated as redraw noise, not confirmed as intentional.
Two new items added: floor lamp, table lamp (table lamp rests on top of the now-horizontal bookshelf).

walls.name: hallway-west-stub
walls.note: connects TV wall to hallway back wall

openings.name: balcony-door
openings.note: full-height glass balcony door, charcoal aluminum frame

openings.name: window
openings.note: framed window, charcoal aluminum frame; headHeightCm corrected from a literal 120 (spike/geometry.json's "sill 90 / height 120" meant a 120cm-tall opening, i.e. head = sill + height = 210, not head = 120)

items.name: West Elm Cozy Swivel Chair
items.notes: Round barrel-style swivel armchair, charcoal melange fabric. Product page: 38.6"w x 35.4"d x 28.7"h, seat height 16.5".

items.name: TV Stand
items.notes: Mid-century oak/ash media unit, white drawer fronts, open middle shelf, tapered legs.

items.name: Samsung Frame TV
items.notes: 65" Samsung The Frame (QN65LS03B, purchased 2023), Beveled-style customizable bezel in White (angled/mitered profile, not the flat Modern style), mounted flush on north wall above TV stand via included slim-fit wall mount. Dims from official Samsung spec (57.4 x 32.8 x 1 in, without stand).

items.name: Billy + Hogadal Unit
items.notes: 2x BILLY/HOGADAL bookcases with woven bamboo doors on 2x BILLY rolling drawers.

items.name: Dining Table
items.notes: West Elm Modern Expandable, unexpanded; white lacquer top, pecan legs.

items.name: APPLARYD Sofa
items.notes: L-shape, faces north (toward TV wall). Chaise on WEST end. Dims from IKEA product page — main width 290 corrects the Figma-drawn 322 (drawn footprint included chaise overlap), matching the tv-stand precedent of trusting product specs over the drawn box.

items.name: Bookshelf
items.notes: Pine open bookcase, laid on its side, legs removed. Back particle-board panel removed — open both sides, books (spines out) accessible from either face.

items.name: IKEA STALL Shoe Cabinet
items.notes: White, 3 flip-down compartments, front legs only.

items.name: Floor Lamp
items.notes: New since spike 3. Footprint is base diameter.

items.name: Table Lamp
items.notes: New since spike 3. Footprint is base diameter. Rests on top of the now-horizontal bookshelf.

cameras.name: couch-view
cameras.note: seated on the sofa main seat, looking north at the TV wall

commands.note: NW corner by TV wall; backrest toward the corner, open front facing SE into the room. rotationDeg not meaningful yet (circular footprint, no facing convention defined) — orientation is qualitative until Phase 4 calibration.
rotated 90deg since spike 3; intrinsic dims unchanged (153x92)
main body center (Figma main rect x510 z609 322x93); chaise extends from the west end per item's own main/chaise sub-footprints
elevationCm 72 = resting on top of the horizontal bookshelf
